evidence: The paper uses a ranger random forest model only for imputation of missing pedoclimatic zone assignments (Section 2.2), reporting solely the out-of-bag error rate (0.057). All substantive conclusions about agricultural management effects on SOC derive from mixed linear models with backward stepwise elimination: 'Impact of agricultural practices on SOC was assessed using mixed linear models with pedoclimatic zones as a random effect and management indicators as fixed effects... Model simplification was performed using stepwise backward elimination of non-significant terms via the step() function from the lmerTest package.' No variable importance extraction, Gini impurity, or MDI metrics are mentioned anywhere in the text.
